metadata.title: Syrena Holistic
metadata.description: Holistic wellness — tarot readings, yoga, energy healing, breathwork, and sound baths to awaken your inner sight.

hero.title:
Awaken the Sight
Within You
hero.subtitle: Tarot readings, yoga, energy healing, breathwork, and sound baths — ancient arts woven together to illuminate your path and restore wholeness.

mission.title: The Veil Is Thin Here
mission.description: At Syrena Holistic, we believe healing begins when body, mind, and spirit speak the same language. Through sacred practices passed down through centuries — from the turning of the cards to the vibration of singing bowls — we guide you back to the knowing that already lives within you.

items.title: Tarot & Divination
items.description: Peer beyond the veil. Our intuitive readings illuminate hidden patterns, guide decisions, and reconnect you with your deepest wisdom.

items.title: Heart-Centered Healing
items.description: Energy work that dissolves blockages and restores flow. Reiki, chakra balancing, and crystal healing to nourish your subtle body.

items.title: Ancient Meets Modern
items.description: We honor timeless traditions while making them accessible. In-person and virtual sessions designed to meet you wherever you are.

items.title: Sound & Breath Rituals
items.description: Singing bowls, guided breathwork, and vibrational ceremonies that quiet the mind and attune you to your own frequency.

items.name: Tarot Readings
items.description: Intuitive card readings that reveal hidden truths, illuminate crossroads, and offer guidance from the unseen. Each session is a sacred dialogue between you and the cards.

items.name: Yoga & Movement
items.description: Mindful, breath-led movement to ground the body and open energetic pathways. From gentle hatha to flowing vinyasa, every practice is an act of devotion.

items.name: Energy Healing
items.description: Reiki, chakra balancing, and crystal therapy to clear stagnant energy and restore harmony. Emerge lighter, clearer, and deeply nourished.

items.name: Sound Bath & Breathwork
items.description: Immerse yourself in the resonance of singing bowls, chimes, and guided pranayama. A vibrational journey that dissolves tension and returns you to stillness.

items.quote: My tarot reading with Syrena was like having a conversation with my own soul. Things I'd been avoiding suddenly made sense, and I left feeling clear for the first time in months.
items.name: Elena V.

items.quote: The sound bath was transcendent. I could feel layers of stress dissolving with each vibration. I've never experienced anything so profoundly calming.
items.name: James R.

items.quote: Syrena's yoga classes feel like a ritual, not just a workout. The intention and energy she brings creates a space where real transformation happens.
items.name: Amara L.

cta.title: The Cards Are Drawn. The Path Awaits.
cta.description: Step into your healing. Whether through the wisdom of tarot, the stillness of breath, or the warmth of energy work — your journey inward begins here.

about.title: About Syrena Holistic
about.description: We are practitioners, seekers, and guides — devoted to the art of holistic healing and the mysteries that connect all living things.

history.title: Our Story
history.content: Syrena Holistic was born from a calling — a deep knowing that ancient wisdom and modern life are not opposites, but partners. Rooted in the traditions of tarot, energy healing, yoga, and sound ceremony, we created a sanctuary where the mystical is welcomed and the practical is honored. Every offering is designed to help you see more clearly, feel more deeply, and live more fully.

programs.title: Our Services
programs.description: From intuitive tarot readings to transformative sound baths, discover the holistic practices that speak to your spirit.

list.title: Tarot & Divination
list.description: Intuitive readings that illuminate your path, reveal hidden patterns, and reconnect you with your inner knowing.

list.title: Yoga & Movement
list.description: Sacred, breath-led practice to ground the body, open the heart, and awaken the energy that flows within.

list.title: Energy Healing
list.description: Reiki, chakra work, and crystal therapy to dissolve blockages, restore balance, and nourish the subtle body.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Questions about our offerings, private sessions, or collaborations? We'd love to hear from you.
